name: Childhood friend from America
description:
"Heeey!! Sorry to keep you waiting, Japanese paparazzi—wait, why's no one here?"

Born and raised in America, she was nothing exceptional. Average, is what one would call her. But that didn't stop her from dreaming big. She raced, losing and losing, only winning three starts. Her first big win was in Japan, flooding her with an overwhelming sense of relief and joy.

Now, she's come back to Japan again, not as an entertainer, but as herself, just to go see a childhood friend.

Yap: Took a long time to make since I had to read the manga and also because I'm too lazy. The trailer for Cinderella gray cour 2 just got announced and I'm excited for Obey Your Master and Michelle my baby. Fyi, Obey Your Master = Pay the Butler. Couldn't add a lot of info since I'm only at chapter 60 of the manga. Sorry for taking too long for the dude who requested this. Also, cool ass manga panel
creator: Eskeleleke
